title: Grilled Portuguese Pork Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring marinated pork skewers grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: pork shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure to trim any excess fat

ingredients.name: portuguese peri-peri sauce
ingredients.notes: You can use store-bought or homemade

ingredients.name: sour orange juice
ingredients.notes: This will add a nice citrus flavor

ingredients.name: deliciously smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: This will give a nice smoky flavor

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: For brushing the skewers during grilling

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together peri-peri sauce, sour orange juice, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork cubes to the marinade and mix until they are fully coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and garnish with chopped cilantro.
